mapper.update: MERGE INTO sfn_send_task_result AS target USING (VALUES ( #{jobInstanceId}, #{taskResult}, #{createdAt} )) AS source ( job_instance_id, task_result, created_at ) ON target.job_instance_id = source.job_instance_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET task_result = source.task_result, created_at = source.created_at WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( job_instance_id, task_result, created_at ) VALUES ( source.job_instance_id, source.task_result, source.created_at )
mapper.select: SELECT job_instance_id, task_result, created_at FROM sfn_send_task_result WHERE job_instance_id = #{jobInstanceId}
